name: rapids-gcp
description: GCP architecture, Terraform, and deployment for RAPIDS projects

analysis.description: Analyze requirements and design GCP architecture including service selection, IAM, networking, and cost estimation

implement.description: Author Terraform modules and configurations to implement the designed GCP architecture

deploy.description: Deploy infrastructure via Terraform apply and Cloud Run deployments to GCP

emulators.description: Google Cloud Bigtable emulator for local development and testing
